prompt: Optimize this MySQL aggregation query that's running a full table scan on 6 million lineitem rows...
assertions: Output identifies DATE(l_shipdate) as redundant/non-sargable and explains that l_shipdate is already a DATE type
Rewritten SQL removes DATE() from SELECT, WHERE, and GROUP BY clauses
Rewritten SQL converts BETWEEN to explicit range conditions or maintains sargable equivalents
Plan comparison shows expected elimination of full table scan (type changes from ALL to range)
Output includes or considers an index recommendation (covering index or composite index)
